data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an auto-maintenance trigger, but the evidence does not confirm its implementation or functionality. The linked use case mentions the need for an auto-maintenance trigger, yet there are no concrete API reads or persisted state checks provided that demonstrate this requirement is met. Specifically, the evidence lacks any indication of the system's behavior after 40 hours of use, leading to a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the auto-maintenance trigger being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the auto-maintenance trigger requirement.
